init_hook: echo -n 'Docker: ' && (docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'nicht erreichbar – Integrationstests werden fehlschlagen')
echo 'Skripte: build | test | test-* | lint | coverage | coverage-html | mutate | metrics | sonar | generate | up | down | up-proxy | down-proxy | run-worker-dev | run-gateway-dev'

scripts.up: docker compose up -d && echo 'NATS gestartet. Warte auf Readiness...' && sleep 2 && docker compose ps
scripts.up-proxy: docker compose --profile proxy up -d && echo 'NATS + Dev Proxy gestartet (http://localhost:8000)' && sleep 3 && docker compose --profile proxy ps
scripts.coverage-report:
go tool cover -func=coverage.out | awk 'BEGIN{print "
Coverage-Report"} /^total/{printf "%-60s %s
", $1, $3; next} {printf "%-60s %s
", $1, $3}' | tail -30
scripts.coverage-html: go test -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./... && go tool cover -html=coverage.out -o coverage.html && echo 'HTML-Report: coverage.html'
scripts.mutate: go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/gateway && go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/quota && go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/spam && go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/worker && go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/pii && go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/hash && go tool gremlins unleash --workers 4 --timeout-coefficient 20 ./internal/msgraph
scripts.metrics: devbox run coverage && devbox run mutate
